summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Pet Life OS mobile features: pet switcher pill buttons, Concierge® branding, ShopMobilePage rewrite, MobileMenu auth guard, Learn/Paperwork Near Me tabs. All features verified working via Playwright + code review. Pets API mock was required due to emergent.sh fetch override in Playwright test browser.

integration_issues.flow: Pets API fetch in Playwright browser
integration_issues.issue: fetch() for /api/pets/my-pets fails with 'TypeError: Failed to fetch' in Playwright due to emergent.sh script overriding window.fetch. Mocked pets API was used for testing. NOT a production bug — real browser works fine.

issues: Pet switcher pills (Mojo/Mystique) appear stacked vertically on 390px viewport due to limited header width, while ShopMobilePage shows them side-by-side. Minor layout inconsistency but functional.

pet_switcher_pill_buttons.details: CareMobilePage, ShopMobilePage, LearnMobilePage, PaperworkMobilePage all show pill buttons for Mojo/Mystique. No native <select> element found. data-testid confirmed: care-mobile, shop-mobile, learn-mobile, paperwork-mobile contain pill button switchers.

concierge_registered_mark.details: PET CONCIERGE® confirmed on login page navbar, pet-home page, care services tab ('all arranged by Concierge®'), services page ('All via Concierge®'). page.evaluate confirms body contains Concierge® text.

shop_mobile_page.details: All 6 category tabs present: for_pet=True, bakery=True, breed=True, browse=True, hampers=True, merch=True. 'For Mojo' tab shows pet name (not placeholder). All tabs have data-testid attributes (shop-cat-*).

mira_picks_button.details: data-testid='see-mira-picks-btn' found. Button text: 'See Mira\'s Shop Picks →'. Click triggered scroll to picks section.

breed_collection_section.details: Clicking Breed tab shows 'Indie Collection' section with 'Soul-made products personalised for Mojo\'s breed'. Breed type filter (breed-type-all) present.

shop_browse_section.details: Browse tab shows 'Browse All Products' heading with search input (placeholder='Search products…'). Category filter pills visible (Everything, Shop, Celebrate, Care). Search input accepts text input.

mobile_menu_auth_guard.details: Authenticated: MobileMenu shows 12 pillar grid, Pet Home/My Requests/Pet Soul nav links, no Sign In/Join buttons. Unauthenticated: code review confirms isLoggedIn=!!userName with Sign In (data-testid=menu-signin-btn) and Join Now (data-testid=menu-join-btn) buttons shown. OLD navbar menu also shows Sign in/Join Now for unauth users on landing page.

learn_mobile_near_me_tab.details: data-testid='learn-tab-nearme' present with text '📍 Near Me'. Clicking Near Me tab shows LearnNearMe component with location-based search. data-testid='learn-tab-learn' also confirmed.

paperwork_mobile_near_me_tab.details: data-testid='pw-tab-nearme' present with text '📍 Near Me'. data-testid='pw-tab-paperwork' also confirmed. PaperworkNearMe component renders under Near Me tab.

services_price_on_request.details: Care Services tab uses concierge request model (no actual rupee prices shown). Services page shows 'All via Concierge®'. Code confirms conditional rendering: p.price ? `₹${p.price}` : 'Price on request' pattern in CelebrateMobilePage.jsx:309 and ShopSoulPage.jsx:509.

critical_code_review_comments: ShopMobilePage.jsx is a new comprehensive 644-line file — all sections (CategoryStrip, MiraPicksSection, BreedCollectionSection, ShopBrowseSection) properly implemented with data-testid attributes.
MobileMenu.jsx isLoggedIn=!!userName correctly gates nav links vs Sign In/Join Now buttons at line 225.
Both Navbar's OLD menu and MobileMenu component have proper unauth fallback to Sign In/Join Now buttons.
PillarContext uses window.fetch which is overridden by emergent.sh script in Playwright — consider using axios for more robust API calls in production if fetch issues arise.
seed_data_creation: Mocked /api/pets/my-pets with Mojo (Indie, chicken allergy) and Mystique (Labrador) for Playwright testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 features in this batch passed. App uses two hamburger menus: OLD isMenuOpen menu and NEW MobileMenu component. To test MobileMenu Sign In/Join Now specifically, need to be on an authenticated page and clear auth state, OR use window.__openMobileMenu with userName=null. Pets API mock needed in Playwright: use page.route('**/*', async_handler) with await route.continue_() for non-pets URLs, and start from root URL before navigating to /login.
screenshots: .screenshots/shop_mobile_test.jpg (Shop with all tabs + Mira Picks button)
